title: Day 7: Task Dependencies
prompt: Each non-empty line has the shape `TASK before A, B, C.` meaning that completing `TASK` is a prerequisite for tasks `A`, `B`, and `C`. The body can also be exactly the literal `nothing` (e.g., `TASK before nothing.`), meaning `TASK` has no downstream tasks. All identifiers are single lowercase words. A task may be named only as a child and never get its own rule line — treat it as a leaf with no downstream tasks. Return the depth of the longest dependency chain in the input: a single task with no children has depth 1; a parent of one leaf has depth 2; and so on. Return 0 for empty input.

tests.name: chain of three
args:
a before b.
b before c.
c before nothing.

tests.name: branching
args:
root before a, b.
a before nothing.
b before nothing.

tests.name: two roots one chain wins
args:
a before nothing.
b before c.
c before d.
d before nothing.

tests.name: diamond
args:
top before left, right.
left before bottom.
right before bottom.
bottom before nothing.

tests.name: long chain
args:
a before b.
b before c.
c before d.
d before e.
e before nothing.

tests.name: wide branching but shallow
args:
root before a, b, c, d, e.
a before nothing.
b before nothing.
c before nothing.
d before nothing.
e before nothing.

tests.name: asymmetric tree picks deeper branch
args:
root before a, b.
a before nothing.
b before x.
x before y.
y before nothing.

parts.title: Part 2: Earliest-time scheduling
parts.prompt: Same input. Each task takes `1` time unit. Tasks with no prerequisites can start at time 0. Each task's start time equals 1 plus the maximum start time of its prerequisites (it must wait for all prerequisites to finish). Return the total finish time of the schedule: the maximum `start_time + 1` across all tasks.

tests.name: chain of three
args:
a before b.
b before c.
c before nothing.

tests.name: branching
args:
root before a, b.
a before nothing.
b before nothing.

tests.name: diamond bottom waits for both
args:
top before left, right.
left before bottom.
right before bottom.
bottom before nothing.

tests.name: parallel two roots
args:
a before nothing.
b before c.
c before d.
d before nothing.

tests.name: long chain
args:
a before b.
b before c.
c before d.
d before e.
e before nothing.

tests.name: wide flat tree
args:
root before a, b, c.
a before nothing.
b before nothing.
c before nothing.

tests.name: deepest chain wins schedule length
args:
root before a, deep1.
a before nothing.
deep1 before deep2.
deep2 before deep3.
deep3 before nothing.
